titleStmt.title: SII 41.86: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 86. (A.R. No. 85 of 1905.) Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai, Ramnad Taluk, Ramnad District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Maṅgalēśvara temple at Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai.

p.hi: Śaka 1425, Dundubhi, Puraṭṭāti, 13, Purva 11, Monday, Tiruvōṇam = 1502 September 12.

summary.p: Sale of some dēvadāna land of the temple by the trustees (Śrī-rudra Śrī-māhēśvarar) of the temple to one Vaḷattuāḻvikkum-perumāḷAḻagiya-tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār of Veṉṟumuḍichūḍiyasundarapāṇḍiyapuram in Pāvūr-nāḍu for a sum of 300 neṉmēṇikalipaṇam stipulating that the purchaser should give half the produce of the land for conducting Śivarātri-pūja, etc in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakāptam 1000 4 100 2 10 5ṉ meṟ cellā niṉṟa dunmubhivaruṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 10 3§
purvapakṣattu EkādaśimsOmavāramum satarmmayogamum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu
nāḷ cempināṭṭu śrīdeśamtiruvuttarakocamaṅkai Uṭaiya nāyaṉār kovilil
śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararompāvūr nāṭṭu veṉṟumuṭicūṭiya cuntarapāṇṭiyapurattu
puliyūruṭaiyāṉ vaḷattuvāḻvikkumperumāḷ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku
vilai pramāṇampiṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi Iṉāyaṉārkkum nācciyār vāruṟupūṇmulai
yārkkum śivarāttri pujai saurādicaṇthān=tamnālu candhiyum Ivar dharmmammāka
naṭattak kaṟpittu Itukku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa muñcāl Ūrp puravunilattil
Oṉṟupāti vilaiyākki Iṟṟaināḷ Ivaraikkoṇṭu koviṟ paṇṭārattukku Oṭukkuvittuk ko
ṇṭa neṉmeṉi kaliputu paṇaṁ03 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟu mūṉṟum vilaiyāvaṇak kaḷatte kāṭṭi
Ēṟṟik kaiccelakkoṇṭu poruḷaṟap paṟṟi vilaikku viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikko
ṭuttom śrīrudramāheśvararomaḻakiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku Ipparicu viṟṟa muta
lil Oṉṟupātiyum śrīpaṇṭārattile kaikkoṇṭu dharmmamāka naṭattukiṟa śivarātripūjai nālu
sandhikkum paṭittarattukku vakai Amutupaṭi 4 100 puḷikaṟiyamutu tulām 4uppu Amutu miḷaku Amutu �
ney Amutu � cāttupaṭi varkakuṅkumam2mā paccaikkaṟpūram Ipatiruccāntu2māpaṉinīrc cempu
� parivaṭṭam 2 mañcaṭkāppu � nellikkāppu mākāppu Ilai Amutu 100 Aṭaikkāy
Amutu 5 10 Amutuceyyak kaṟpūram 5 mā paṇimāṟ m 2mā dhūpadravyamtirumañcaṉa dravyam
� kāppu 2(1/4) vellam � tEṉ 2 vāḻaippaḻam 2 10 teṅkāy 10 1 Iḷanīr 5 pālamutu
tiriccīlai �kumbhattukku mā 2 Ācārdhyadakṣaṉai yāka Aṉaittukkottukkum śivarātripaṭikku
ø (1/2) 10 6 Āka Immariyātiyile Ivvūr Oṉṟu pātiyum viḷaiyilum viḷaiyā toḻiyilum Inta
paṭittarattiṉpaṭiye palakaittalaiyile mutaliṭṭuc cantirātittavarai naṭatti nālāñ cantiyi
le Uṭaiyavarum nācciyārum Amutuceyta Aṇukka taḷikaiyiraṇṭum Intaccantiyiṟ cā
ttu paṭiyum Ivar cantatipiravēcame Aruḷip pāṭukuṭuttu potum paṭikkut tirumalai
puṟattilekalveṭṭik koṭuttom śrī rudraśrī māheśvararom Aḻakiya tiruc
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku Ippaṭikku tiruvuttarakocamaṅkai(pa)yaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
parākkiṟayapāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku civavākkiya mutaliyāṉ Eḻuttu§
śubhamastu . teṉpalicai vāḻvaḷattāṉ ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉaṉpuṭaṉE kaṟpittaruḷa pe
ṟṟāṉiṉpamikat tecattār poṟṟuñ civarāttiri maṅkaiyīcaṟ curam yicaintu §
Digital edition of SII 41.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
